data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for auto-cancel/release rules for unpaid seats, but the evidence provided does not confirm that this functionality is implemented. While the linked use case describes a scenario where unpaid seats are released unless overridden, there is no direct evidence from the steps that demonstrates this behavior in practice. Specifically, the evidence does not show any instances of unpaid seats being automatically canceled or released, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of auto-cancel/release rules for unpaid seats being implemented or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
